LanguageData.MastercraftedArms.Settings.CraftChance.L: Chance for a level 20 crafter to produce a unique weapon
LanguageData.MastercraftedArms.Settings.LevelRequirem: Only pawns with Crafting level 20 can roll for a unique weapon.
LanguageData.MastercraftedArms.Settings.ShowWeaponCus: When enabled, a customization menu appears after creating a unique weapon so you can rename it and choose its traits.
LanguageData.MastercraftedArms.Settings.Customization: These settings only apply when the Weapon Customization Menu is enabled:
LanguageData.MastercraftedArms.Settings.MaxGeneratedT: Controls how many non-conflicting traits are generated for the selection list.
